case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS MARENCO, JOSE ARMANDO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,205.50 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT MARENCO, JOSE ARMANDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-31-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
